original_image_tags: A scanned document page, appearing aged with some discoloration. The page is a "SUPPLEMENT TO AF FORM 112".

hand-drawn sketch showing two distinct radar antenna types side-by-side on what appears to be a horizon line. The left antenna is a large, square, grid-like mesh. The right antenna is a smaller, rectangular, stacked-bar type.

elements.description: A simple hand-drawn sketch depicting two radar antenna structures standing side-by-side. The left structure is a tall pole topped with a rectangular, grid-like antenna. The right structure is a taller, wider antenna composed of horizontal, stacked rectangular elements (resembling a 'Freya' type antenna). There are no labels or text inside the sketch itself.
